lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive repairs to be made roadworthy. The engine has a noticeable knock and there are significant rust spots on the body panels. The interior shows heavy wear and tear, and the transmission shifts roughly. Ideal for a mechanic or someone looking for a major project car.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches, and the interior shows light wear from normal use. All mechanical systems are in good working order.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable option for daily commuting. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are functional, though the vehicle shows its age with some minor fluid seepage and visible cosmetic wear. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and minor dings, while the interior shows moderate staining and upholstery wear. While it remains roadworthy and reliable for basic transportation, a buyer should expect to address some minor suspension noise and plan for upcoming routine maintenance in the near future.

The car is in fair condition. The exterior has some visible scratches and minor dents. The interior shows noticeable signs of wear. While the car is operational, it may require some mechanical maintenance soon.

Looking for a dependable ride that's ready to get you where you need to go? This car is a great choice for anyone seeking value! It’s in fair condition, showing some honest signs of its journey with some cosmetic wear and tear, but it still runs reliably. It’s a solid, straightforward vehicle that’s perfect for daily commuting or as a first car. Come see the character this reliable cruiser has to offer!
Poor condition.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of investment-grade quality. This specimen has been meticulously curated to a standard that transcends typical pre-owned offerings, manifesting in a pristine aesthetic and flawless mechanical integrity. Every detail reflects a rigorous commitment to preservation, from the lustrous exterior finish to the immaculate interior cabin. This represents a premier opportunity to acquire a vehicle in showroom condition, tailored for the most discerning collector.

Hey there! You guys, this car is an absolute dream! It’s in such incredible, flawless shape that you’d swear it just rolled right off the showroom floor. I’ve truly babied this beauty from day one—always garage-kept, meticulously cleaned, and it drives like a total charm. If you’re looking for something that’s been pampered and is in pristine condition, this is the one for you! I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have. Come take a look and see for yourself!
Offered is a concourse-standard 2011 BMW M3 (E92) featuring the iconic S65 4.0L naturally
Mint condition. Single owner. No accidents. Garage kept. Full service history included. Serious inquiries only.

This 2008 Porsche 911 Carrera S is a breathtaking time capsule, preserved in absolute showroom condition. The Guards Red exterior retains a deep, mirror-like luster with zero rock chips or swirls, while the undercarriage remains remarkably clean. Inside, the Sand Beige leather interior is flawless, still carrying that distinct factory aroma with no visible wear on the bolsters or switchgear. Every electronic component and climate control setting functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a meticulous service history from authorized specialists and a smooth, responsive power delivery that feels brand new. Always stored in a climate-controlled garage under a soft cover and never driven in inclement weather, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for a collector to acquire a truly pristine, investment-grade example of a modern classic.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a machine in pristine, showroom condition. Every aspect, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior, reflects a history of uncompromising care. Mechanically superior and aesthetically perfect, this vehicle offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been preserved in showroom condition, exhibiting impeccable paint depth and a pristine interior that retains its original factory luster. Mechanically flawless and fastidiously maintained, this unit represents the pinnacle of its class, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from a new acquisition. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark of quality.

Hey there! You have seriously got to see this absolute beauty. It is in truly pristine condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it and it’s been my absolute pride and joy, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy this flawless ride. It’s super clean, runs like a dream, and is ready for its next adventure with you. Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to chat more about it!
